subcodes.first_line: O seeker of the Chosen Beauty! Cling thou to the hem of piety and lay fast hold on the sure handle. Turn thy gaze unto the Kingdom of Abhá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب جمال مختار بذیل تقی تشبث نما و بعروه وثقی تمسک کن توجه بملکوت ابهی کن
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer
